prompt: A gritty black-and-white manga action page with selective red color on the heroine’s clothing, arranged as 6 comic panels with dynamic diagonal borders on a white page. The central and largest panel shows a fierce young woman with long straight black hair and blunt bangs, wearing a short red kimono-style robe with a wide golden obi sash, barefoot, delivering a high vertical kick into a burly man’s face; her face is obscured by a soft square blur, and the impact explodes with ink splatter and debris. In the top-left panel, the same woman crouches low in a feral fighting stance on cracked ground, one hand touching the earth, hair streaming outward, robe open enough to show powerful legs. A narrow close-up panel shows only her intense eyes under straight bangs, cold and focused. In the bottom-left panel, she drives a straight punch into an attacker with a dramatic burst effect at the point of contact. In the bottom-center panel, she performs a rising kick or sweeping upward strike against another large male opponent, with speed lines and hair flowing. In the bottom-right panel, shown from behind, she stands calmly amid defeated men lying on the ground with smoke or dust rising around them, her long hair cascading down her back and the red robe hanging loosely. Use rough ink brushwork, heavy speed lines, splattered impact effects, high-contrast manga shading, violent kinetic composition, and bold Japanese sound effect lettering in black. The mood is brutal, cinematic, and relentless, like a seinen revenge manga. Keep the page mostly monochrome except for the woman’s red robe and subtle warm sash accents.
